description_long: A rustic wooden bench is set against a red brick wall, supporting an array of terracotta pots filled with various green plants and succulents. The pots are arranged in two tiers, with the upper row resting on a narrow wooden shelf attached to the wall and the lower row on the bench itself. The plants vary in size and type, including leafy greens, succulents, and a few with elongated stems, creating a lush, layered effect. The terracotta pots are mostly plain, with some showing signs of weathering and age. Scattered among the pots are small stones and gardening tools, adding to the natural, lived-in appearance. The overall scene suggests an outdoor urban garden or patio, with sunlight casting a diagonal shadow across the brick wall.
description: A rustic wooden bench and shelf hold multiple terracotta pots with assorted green plants and succulents, set against a red brick wall. The arrangement is lush and varied, evoking an outdoor urban garden.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full arrangement of terracotta pots, plants, and the wooden bench against the brick wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the plant arrangement and the staggered placement of pots on the bench and shelf.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the brick wall and the backs of the pots, with less visibility of the plants themselves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the leafy plants and succulents extending outward from the pots, with the bench and shelf structure visible.
